结节病.summary: 美国单中心25年研究显示，肺移植治疗肺结节病患者的生存率随年代改善，但慢性移植物功能障碍仍是主要挑战。

结节病.title: When the lung is at risk: diagnosis, manifestations, and complications of pulmonary sarcoidosis.
结节病.authors: Dhanani Z, Vorselaars AD, Gupta R, Spagnolo P
结节病.summary: 肺结节病可致纤维化和肺动脉高压，需表型驱动治疗并探索新型抗纤维化药物。

ILD.title: Osimertinib plus datopotamab deruxtecan in patients with EGFR-mutated advanced NSCLC after progression on first-line osimertinib: ORCHARD.
ILD.authors: Riess JW, Yu HA, Le X, de Langen AJ, Cho BC, Piotrowska Z, Hendriks LEL, Morabito A, Bonanno L, Brustugun OT, Halvorsen TO, Kim YJ, Marrone KA, Shiraishi Y, Goldman JW, Ambrose H, Smith PE, FraenkeI PG, Tang KH, Lehman JM, Goldberg SB
ILD.summary: 奥希替尼联合Datopotamab deruxtecan在EGFR突变NSCLC一线奥希替尼进展后显示出43%客观缓解率及约9-12个月无进展生存期。

ILD.title: Izalontamab brengitecan (Iza-bren; BL-B01D1), a first-in-class EGFR-HER3 bispecific antibody-drug conjugate, for patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC: pooled analysis of phase I and phase II trials.
ILD.authors: Hong SD, Wang YS, Zhao HY, Zhao YY, Wang QM, Ma YX, Li YS, Huang Y, Yang YP, Fu ZM, Chen LK, Zhou F, Yang J, Li XY, Hou X, Zhou NN, Sun LH, Zhang GF, Cui JW, Wu L, Chen G, Zhang YX, Wang HY, Lv DQ, Shi JH, Jiang B, Li C, Li XL, Tang KJ, Yu Y, Ji YH, He ZY, Zhu Y, Zhu H, Xiao S, Zhou CC, Zhang L, Fang WF
ILD.summary: 该药用于EGFR突变NSCLC后线治疗，客观缓解率47.4%，疾病控制率81.3%。

ILD.title: Prevalence and screening of interstitial lung disease in rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Gono T
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Pulmonary toxicity of immune-checkpoint inhibitors.
ILD.authors: Mahiat C, Cadranel J, Fallet V, Meteye C, Gendarme S, Slomka J, Canellas A
ILD.summary: 免疫检查点抑制剂相关性肺炎虽罕见但致命，需警惕高危人群并积极管理。

ILD.title: Interstitial lung disease and the STING pathway.
ILD.authors: Velu PP, Zhu G, Mackenzie KJ
ILD.summary: STING通路参与罕见间质性肺病发病机制，但STING靶向治疗对常见ILD的适用性尚不明确。

ILD.title: Detection of rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
ILD.authors: Qi S, Jiang Y, Li H, Gong X, Li Q, Zhou X, Li S
ILD.summary: 荟萃分析显示血清生物标志物、肺超声及机器学习模型可作为RA-ILD早期筛查工具，但需HRCT确诊。

ILD.title: Rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: screening, diagnosis, and treatment-an expert group consensus statement.
ILD.authors: Solomon JJ, Dieude P, Matson SM, Lee JS, Rojas-Serrano J, Sebastiani M, Gonzalez A, Demoruelle MK, Hoffman-Vold AM, Kam MLW, Swigris JJ, Sparks JA, Brown KK, Cottin V, Kellermeyer LM, Wilson KC, Waseda Y, Crestani B, Walsh SLF, Poletti V, Doyle T, Koduri G, Kelly C, Danoff S, Dellaripa PF
ILD.summary: 专家共识指出，类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病需筛查、及时诊断及个体化治疗。

ILD.title: Methodological considerations for quantitative computed tomography-based prognosis in fibrotic interstitial lung disease.
ILD.journal: Am J Respir Crit Care Med
ILD.authors: Hong Y, Shu Z
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Combined immunosuppressive therapy in systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease: Phenotypes matter.
ILD.authors: Marchetti M, Motta F, Tonutti A, Selmi C, De Santis M
ILD.summary: 联合免疫抑制治疗对炎症性进展性系统性硬化相关间质性肺病有效，需基于表型个体化。

ILD.title: The evolving comorbidity landscape of rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Brooks RT, England BR, Kronzer VL, Crowson CS
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎共病谱演变：间质性肺病及心理疾病负担增加，需加强针对性筛查。

ILD.title: Cutaneous manifestations in myositis syndromes.
ILD.authors: Schedler NC, Raheel O, de la Garza JAC, Edminister JR
ILD.summary: 特发性炎性肌病中特定皮疹与肌炎特异性抗体及间质性肺病风险显著相关。

ILD.title: Characterization of CT-Derived Pulmonary Vascular Abnormalities Associated with Pulmonary Hypertension in Chronic Lung Disease.
ILD.authors: Garcia AR, Vollmer I, Blanco I, San Jose Estepar R, Rodriguez-Chiaradia DA, Lopez-Meseguer M, Martin-Ontiyuelo C, Nardelli P, Hernandez-Gonzalez F, Bosacoma A, Ribas J, Pomares X, Santos S, Molina-Molina M, Sellares J, Rahaghi FN, Washko G, San Jose Estepar R, Barbera JA
ILD.summary: CT显示慢性肺病合并肺动脉高压患者存在肺血管体积异常，且与肺实质损伤和肺动脉高压严重程度相关。

ILD.title: Integrated machine learning risk model for predicting radiation pneumonitis in lung cancer patients with interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Lu H, Jiang A, Yuan Z, Chen D
ILD.summary: 机器学习整合多模态数据的新模型可有效预测肺癌合并间质性肺炎患者的放射性肺炎风险。

ILD.title: Inhaled nitric oxide in fibrotic and advanced interstitial lung disease: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
ILD.authors: Nakahara S, Hirao Y, Fujiuchi B, Matsuda B
ILD.summary: 吸入一氧化氮未能显著改善间质性肺病患者的6分钟步行距离，但可能增加中高强度体力活动时间。

ILD.title: Bridging the Gap: The Emerging Role of memory CD8+ T Cells in Fibrotic Interstitial Lung Disease.
ILD.journal: Am J Respir Cell Mol Biol
ILD.authors: Celada SI, Ryter SW, Baughman RP, Van Kaer L, Celada LJ
ILD.summary: 记忆性CD8+ T细胞在纤维化间质性肺病中通过促进细胞毒炎症和损害上皮修复驱动疾病进展。

ILD.title: Long-term safety and pulmonary function stabilization with nintedanib in systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease, 2020-2025: a real-world retrospective study from a reference centre.
ILD.authors: Panopoulos S, Poulia V, Vlachogiannis N, Bournia VK, Tektonidou MG, Sfikakis PP
ILD.summary: 在真实世界SSc-ILD患者中，尼达尼布长期安全稳定，常见副作用为腹泻，但肺功能可保持稳定。

ILD.title: Using Genetic Risk Scores for Rheumatoid Arthritis-Associated Interstitial Lung Disease Risk Stratification.
ILD.authors: McDermott GC, Sparks JA
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Predictors of rapidly progressive interstitial lung disease in anti-MDA5 dermatomyositis: a meta-analysis.
ILD.authors: Liu T, Ji X, Wei Y, Zhong Y, Zhu J, Wang C, Li M
ILD.summary: 该Meta分析发现，高龄、男性、发热、皮肤溃疡及关节炎是抗MDA5阳性皮肌炎患者发生快速进展性间质性肺病的预测因素。

ILD.title: The cell with many faces: lung macrophage plasticity and function in response to environmental and pathogenic insults.
ILD.authors: Dubey S, Khan J, Alishlash AS, Matalon S
ILD.summary: 肺泡巨噬细胞对环境与病原刺激具有表型可塑性，其功能紊乱可导致慢性肺部疾病。

ILD.title: Significance of geriatric nutritional risk index in predicting lung-transplant waiting list mortality of patients with interstitial lung disease regardless of percentage forced vital capacity.
ILD.authors: Konoeda C, Toyokawa G, Yamaguchi M, Yamaya T, Aakamine T, Kawashima M, Shimokawa M, Sato M
ILD.summary: 老年营养风险指数（GNRI）可独立于用力肺活量预测间质性肺病患者等待肺移植时的死亡率。
